heroSubtitle: A rooftop above the noise of Itahari. Red neon, slow conversation, and coffee made the way it should be — since 2015.
aboutParagraph1: Cafe Upstairs sits one flight above the main road in Itahari, Sunsari — close enough to watch the traffic and the lights below, far enough to feel like you've stepped away from it.
aboutParagraph2: Since 2015 we've poured everything from classic espresso to cold brews, blended seasonal fruit juices, and plated comfort food alongside menu staples — built around one idea: stay as long as you like.
aboutParagraph3: Vinyl-warm lighting, framed prints, and a wall of stories make every table feel like the corner booth you come back to.
menuCat1Desc: Espresso, cappuccino, cold brew, mocha, and the house specials — almost every kind of coffee you'd ask for.
menuCat2Desc: Seasonal fruit blended fresh, plus a full line-up of cold drinks for Itahari's warmer afternoons.
menuCat3Desc: From quick bites to sit-down plates — almost every food item, made fresh in-house, table to table.
signParagraph: Look up on your way past the main road — if the red glow is on, we're open and the table by the rail is waiting.
hours: Stop by morning through late evening
footerTagline: Coffee, cold drinks & fresh seasonal juice — one flight up, in the heart of Itahari. Since 2015.
